must_do.full_text:
Noam Shazeer, the AI legend Google paid $2.7B to bring back two years ago, has left Google, to join OpenAI.

Brutal news for Gemini.
must_do.summary: AI传奇人物Noam Shazeer离开Google加入OpenAI，Google曾在两年前花27亿美元将其招回。
angles: 27亿美元挖角失败｜AI传奇Noam Shazeer投奔OpenAI
Google的噩梦｜顶级AI科学家为何弃谷歌而去
Gemini的危机时刻｜失去Noam Shazeer意味着什么

must_do.full_text: “Sir… Noam Shazeer, the legend who invented the Transformer… who Sundar paid $2.7 billion to bring back and led Gemini… sir… it hasn’t even been two years and announced he’s leaving Google AGAIN…” https://t.co/YJELJyFUuU
must_do.summary: Noam Shazeer（Transformer发明者）加入Google仅不到两年后再次离职。Google曾花27亿美元将其挖回领导Gemini项目，如今突然宣布离开，引发业界关注。
viral_signals: 有人物/团队故事：Noam Shazeer传奇身份
反常识/意外性：27亿美元挖角后不到两年离职
angles: 27亿美元挖角不到两年就离职，Noam Shazeer为何再次离开Google？
Transformer之父突然离职：Google的27亿美元投资打了水漂？
AI大佬离职潮：Noam Shazeer离开Google背后的真相

must_do.full_text:
What Midjourney is:

- No investors, fully community-funded research lab
- Revenue from image generation product funds all R&D
- ~$100M in first 9 months, $200M by month 12, still growing
- 8 active projects: 4 hardware, 4 software
----2 hardware products coming to market soon https://t.co/eHOqUOjB4p
must_do.summary: Midjourney无融资、社区自筹，9个月营收$100M、12个月$200M，8个项目进行中（4硬件4软件），2款硬件产品即将上市。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：硬件产品即将上市
反常识：无融资却高速增长
angles: Midjourney终于要出硬件了，2款产品即将面世
无融资却赚$200M，Midjourney如何做到的？
8个秘密项目曝光：Midjourney硬件野心有多大

must_do.full_text:
R.I.P. rebuilding your GTM stack from scratch every session.

A complete Claude Skill Library can replace a $15,000/month agency retainer.

It is not as easy as hiring someone else to do it.

But if you start today, you can have 130+ skills loaded into Claude Code covering every https://t.co/JJFjoB2ZBx
must_do.summary: Claude推出Skill Library功能，可替代15000美元/月的GTM代理服务。用户可加载130+预制技能到Claude Code中，实现自动化工作流。
viral_signals: 终于型选题（R.I.P. rebuilding from scratch）
angles: Claude Skill Library：用130+预制技能替代$15K月费代理
5分钟上手Claude Code，自建GTM自动化工具库
从零开始每次重建？这个功能让你一劳永逸

must_do.full_text:
noam is one of the people I have most wanted to work with since the very beginning of openai.

only took 10 years.

i think it will be worth the wait!
must_do.summary: Sam Altman宣布Noam Shazeer加入OpenAI，这是他10年来最想合作的人之一。Google曾在2024年花27亿美元收购他，18个月后离职。
angles: Google 27亿美元挖角，18个月后被OpenAI挖回——AI人才争夺战升级

Goldman Sachs also did the same last month 

It’s over https://t.co/YAvtg3W8sM

must_do.full_text:
Noam Shazeer - co-author of the Transformer, T5, and Switch Transformer papers, and one of the pioneers of sparse MoE models - is leaving his VP Engineering / Gemini co-lead role at Google DeepMind to join OpenAI

This is likely the most significant AI talent move of the year.
must_do.summary: Transformer论文共同作者、Google DeepMind VP工程师Noam Shazeer加入OpenAI。年度最重大AI人才流动，反映AI竞争格局变化。
angles: Transformer之父离职Google投奔OpenAI
年度最大AI人才地震：稀有顶级科学家的选择

must_do.full_text:
Introducing LifeSciBench, a benchmark for measuring and improving how well AI supports real-world life science research.

Developed with 173 scientists from biotechnology and pharmaceutical research, LifeSciBench includes 750 expert-authored tasks across seven biological research https://t.co/JDkKWcnL9F
must_do.summary: OpenAI与173位生命科学家合作推出LifeSciBench基准，包含750个专家级任务，用于评估AI在真实生物研究中的表现。这是AI在科研领域应用的重要里程碑。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：首个生命科学AI基准
有明确数字：173位科学家、750个任务
angles: OpenAI联手173位科学家，AI终于能做真实科研了
750个生物学任务，LifeSciBench如何改变AI研发
从实验室到药物发现，AI科研助手的新突破

must_do.full_text:
today we're launching  @Palmier_io, a video editor Claude can edit.

use AI to edit, organize, and generate footage directly in the timeline.

finally, a video editor built for AI.

open-source. mac native. available now. https://t.co/LjYNpH4Rot

Claude直接编辑视频时间线，AI视频制作新范式
开源+Mac原生，AI视频编辑工具生态突破

must_do.full_text:
Claude Code and Claude Design now sync both ways.

Run /design-sync to pull your design system into your repo and build against your real components, or push what you've built back into Claude Design and keep editing on the canvas.

angles: Claude Code和Design终于双向同步，开发流程革新

priority.full_text:
stop telling Claude Code/Codex "do this".
stop telling Claude Code/Codex "write code".
stop telling Claude Code/Codex "fix this bug".

you're using a 𝘀𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗼𝗿 𝗔𝗜 like it's a 𝗷𝘂𝗻𝗶𝗼𝗿 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗻.

here are 8 prompts and goals you can copy-paste directly.
